name: Ultrabulk
message: The Ultranav General Business Principles are the commitment that the company has undertaken with its stakeholders about how to conduct its business at all times, based on its values and corporate culture.  All Ultranav stakeholders, be they employees, customers, suppliers, the community or the competition, are invited to raise their doubts and/or make whistleblowing reports on the activities undertaken by our organisation.  All information reported will be treated in a confidential manner. The Ultranav Ethical Committee will critically evaluate all incoming reports and address issues according to our principles.
